title: The Candy Payment Becomes a Crisis
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the candy payment becomes a crisis.
scene: The scene focuses on the candy payment becomes a crisis, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When he glares, he looks kind of...cute...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh hey, this is the sweet factory!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Luffy-San!! Is the Banquet over already?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: luffy- kin... why are you here...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Could you keep your voice down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh, look! old droopy's here too!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Listen, Mr. Pekoms, I can explain .

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whoa, it's another weird guy... who're you?

summary: The Candy Payment Becomes a Crisis. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
